base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tilesets_6_regions — a tile from 1994 super metroid. 6 region tilesets — Crateria/Brinstar/Norfair/Wrecked Ship/Maridia (water)/Tourian (final). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
